entries.source: Chat Edit: 'Please make a blob to gguf converter in the IDE! This isnt to be just the scaffolding, this is to be the entire addition!'

Chat Edit: 'Recommendation: Ensure a GGUF model is selected in the UI before running @analyze commands, as the engine correctly detected that no local model was currently resident in memory.


These should be workable with the blobs as well!'

Chat Edit: 'Please tell me if everything that was recently made was correctly integrated into my agentic IDE aka all the widget stubholders that were recently fully gone over and made non placeholders and integrated into fully working features and complete any that arent, not by simplfying them but by making them complete !'
Chat Edit: 'Please fix all compilation and linking errors'
Chat Edit: 'Please continue from where we left off fully fixing the IDE errors until it builds successfully please!'
Chat Edit: 'Please continue from where we left off fully fixing the IDE errors until it builds successfully please!'
